reason: Code fix verified in source and dist files, but running Electron app uses old packaged app.asar that wasn't rebuilt. Test could not complete UI verification.
steps: Connected to Electron app via agent-browser --auto-connect
Clicked 'Tambah COA' button to open form
Observed error: 'Kode harus berupa angka' (old validation error)
Verified placeholder text shows 'Contoh: 100, 110, 111' (old format, not new '11-11-001' example)
blockingRootCause: The 'npm run build' command builds the dist folder but does not rebuild the app.asar package in release/win-unpacked/resources/. The running Electron app uses the old packaged code.
